message:
fix: pass r.Path instead of townRoot to NewWithBeadsDir in getBeadLabel (gt-brmfz)

getBeadLabel was passing townRoot (parent of rig directory) as workDir to
beads.NewWithBeadsDir, but the correct workDir is r.Path (the rig path
where .beads/ lives). This matches the pattern used in initAgentBeads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
